---
title: "Start"
subtitle: "A short path through the package contracts."
sidebar: start
---

Work through these pages in order:

1. [Wrap a stimulus](01-wrap-a-stimulus.qmd) - create typed inputs from arrays and strings.
2. [List and plan features](02-list-and-plan-features.qmd) - inspect the catalogue before running extraction.
3. [Extract features](03-extract-features.qmd) - execute a small feature request and align one output to another.
4. [Export tables](04-export-tables.qmd) - turn feature objects and alignments into modeling-ready rows.
5. [Media and optional backends](05-media-and-optional-backends.qmd) - plan OCR, face, CLIP, DINO, and video-audio routes without accidentally running them.

The package name and import name intentionally differ. The package is not yet
published on PyPI, so install it from a checkout:

```bash
git clone https://github.com/bbuchsbaum/natural-features.git
cd natural-features
python -m pip install -e .
```

```python
import natural_features as nf
```
